plan_summary: Replace the hardcoded status bar text 'All systems operational' with 'Agent System Online' in the Dashboard component. This is a single-line string replacement in the React frontend with no logic changes.

files.description: Find the status bar text 'All systems operational' and replace it with 'Agent System Online'. This is a direct string replacement in the JSX markup.

integration_notes: The Dashboard component is already imported and routed in App.js. No changes to App.js, routing, backend, or state management are needed. This is a pure text replacement in the status bar UI element.
testing_instructions: 1. Start the React dev server (npm start in frontend/). 2. Log in to the application. 3. Navigate to the Dashboard route (/dashboard). 4. Verify the status bar now displays 'Agent System Online' instead of 'All systems operational'. 5. Confirm no other functionality is affected.
